subcodes.first_line: Pure and sanctified hath been and ever shall be that Sovereign Who hath illumined the horizon of the world with the rays of the Most Great Luminary [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پاک و مقدس بوده و خواهد بود سلطانیکه افق عالم را بانوار نیر اعظم منور فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
